title: Revert the removal of buildah dependency
body:
We currently need it to drag in recent versions of other dependencies, per https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/796 .

I'll work to update the relevant dependencies in c/image, but that will only propagate to skopeo in the next c/image release; in the meantime, this at least undoes the downgrades.

Reverts parts of #867.
